val_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/main_benchmark.py ./main.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/options_benchmark.py ./params/options.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/utils.py ./utils.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/param_stamp.py ./params/param_stamp.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/evaluate.py ./eval/evaluate.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/callbacks.py ./eval/callbacks.py && python main.py --experiment=splitMNIST --scenario=class --si --split val
test_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/main_benchmark.py ./main.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/options_benchmark.py ./params/options.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/utils.py ./utils.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/param_stamp.py ./params/param_stamp.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/evaluate.py ./eval/evaluate.py && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Continual_Learning_continual_learning/original_file_backup/callbacks.py ./eval/callbacks.py && python main.py --experiment=splitMNIST --scenario=class --si --split test
